description_long: This is a modern, compact rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a polymer lower receiver and a metal upper receiver with a full-length Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories. The rifle has a fixed stock with an ergonomic design, a pistol grip, and a detachable curved magazine. The barrel is relatively short, ending in a small flash hider or compensator, and the handguard is integrated with the upper receiver, providing a streamlined appearance. Iron sights are present, with the front and rear sights mounted on the rail. The overall design is tactical and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments and close-quarters use.
description: A compact, matte black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, full-length rail, detachable magazine, and iron sights. Its streamlined design and short barrel make it ideal for urban scenarios.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, flash hider, and narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, pistol grip, magazine, and Picatinny rail.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock's width and the alignment of the upper receiver and rail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, magazine release, and overall tactical design.
